title: CopperAndCrystalForFabric
description: This is a simple mod, the main content is to give amethyst and copper a lot of use for 1.18.2.
body:
This Mod is a Mod ported from "[CAC] Copper And Crystal (Copper And Crystal)" on the Forge side to the Fabric side. On the basis of re-engraving CAC, some more interesting items will be added, including amethyst and copper tools, armor and weapons also found a way out as building blocks for flint, obsidian, tuff and so on.

This mod is under development, more interesting things are planned to be added in the future =)
